tagline: Turns clinical notes into clean, compliant claims — a certified coder signs only the risky ones.
problem: Manual medical coding is slow, expensive, and error-prone; miscoding drives denials and False-Claims-Act exposure.
outcome: Clean claims submitted straight-through; risky claims escalated to a certified coder; denials and overpayments handled.

steps.does: Pull the clinical note from the EHR
Assign ICD-10 / CPT codes with the supporting note span
Run NCCI / MUE edits, medical-necessity, and the upcoding guardrail
A certified coder signs off below the confidence floor or on any FCA-high pattern
Track denials and refund overpayments (60-day rule)
